description: UVM verification environment for an AXI4 interconnect. Three master UVCs (CPU, DMA, GPU) and four slave UVCs (SRAM, DDR, UART, SPI) each decomposed into per-channel agents (AW, W, B, AR, R). Read and write scoreboards verify transaction integrity. All TLM connections are internal to the environment.

testbench.description: Top-level testbench. Drives clk/rst and connects virtual interfaces between the DUT interconnect and UVC agents.

uvm_env.description: Top-level UVM environment. Contains all per-channel agents, scoreboards, sequences and the interconnect DUT.

axi4_interconnect.description: AXI4 crossbar / interconnect (DUT). Routes transactions from master ports to slave ports based on address decoding.

uvm_read_scoreboard.description: Read scoreboard — compares AR and R transactions

ports.name: analysis_export
ports.description: Analysis export for AR/R monitor transactions

uvm_write_scoreboard.description: Write scoreboard — compares AW, W and B transactions

ports.name: analysis_export
ports.description: Analysis export for AW/W/B monitor transactions

instances.description: Read sequence — drives AR and R agents via TLM
Write sequence — drives AW, W and B agents via TLM
Read scoreboard — checks AR/R transaction integrity
Write scoreboard — checks AW/W/B transaction integrity
